scripts.docker:db:reset: docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase db reset --local"
scripts.docker:db:migration:up: docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase migration up --include-all --local"
scripts.docker:db:types: docker compose run --rm supabase-cli sh -lc "supabase start && supabase gen types typescript --local > packages/frontend/src/types/database.types.ts"
